Moving The Web Forward

We’re a dynamic team of creatives and strategists driving online success with cutting-edge web design, branding, and digital marketing services.

We help companies succeed online
through web design, SEO, branding,
and digital marketing services.

Our Featured Work
Ready to Chat? (780) 760 3333 About Web3

Celebrating 18 Years of Edmonton Web Design Excellence

Helping you through the entire customer journey.

Web3 is a website design company with over 18 years of experience. We work with businesses and organizations of all shapes and sizes to improve online exposure. Helping you build a beautiful responsive website is only part of what we can do for you – our custom-built backend (the Web3 Framework) is built to streamline SEO and drive more organic traffic.

Our Edmonton Website Design Experts Are Ready to Help!

Tell us about your Edmonton website design project, mobile or desktop – chances are, we’ll have a few ideas to share and explore with you!

Website Design &
Development

Our team will craft and launch your website to wow on both mobile and desktop.

Read More +

Web Design & Development

As a leading Edmonton website design and development agency, we’ve designed, built and optimized websites across virtually every industry. Our exclusive framework boosts SEO, slashes loading times, and packs in advanced features for functionality. We’re here to supercharge your brand, build your online presence and drive traffic to your website.

View Featured Work

Search Engine
Optimization

We’ll drive more traffic to your website through Search Engine Optimization (SEO).

Read More +

Search Engine Optimization & Local SEO

Having a strong brand and well-crafted website is just the beginning. In today’s digital hustle, Google visibility is crucial for any digital marketing strategy. We leverage the latest SEO tools and proven industry strategies to boost your rankin and drive serious traffic to your website

View SEO Results

Google Ads &
Digital Marketing

We’ll tailor a Google Ads and Remarketing strategy to fit your business needs.

Read More +

Google Ads & Digital Marketing

We’ll tailor the perfect Google Ads, Remarketing, and Social Media strategy to fit your business. While web design is our bread and butter, our partnership with a top Google Premier Partner to deliver a full suite of digital marketing services and access to Canada’s most advanced analytics tools.

Discover Digital Marketing Services

We Work With Everyone From Startups and Small Businesses to Some of Western Canada’s Most Recognized Brands.

Our Recent Work

Lake Louise
Ski Resort

We are proud to have designed and developed the new website for the Lake Louise Ski Resort. Our team is thrilled to have worked with this iconic brand (which also happens to be one of our favourite destinations).

View Case Study
View Full Portfolio

The exclusive web design framework engineered to streamline SEO and skyrocket Google rankings. Coupled with 18 years of SEO know-how, our Edmonton website design and development agency is set to amp up your online presence and make your brand shine.

The Web3 Framework install does the heavy lifting for you

Faster
Loading Speed

Unlock lightning-fast website loading speed with our proprietary backend configuration! Our websites load in just 500 – 900 ms, making them some of the speediest in the business. Put us to the test yourself by checking loading speed through tools.pingdom.com

Better SEO
Structure

Our Framework comes packed with killer SEO features that streamline the optimization process so we can get more done within your budget. This means more time to jazz up your design, craft content, and crush both on-page and off-page SEO.

More
Flexibility

Although our Framework uses our proprietary backend to assist with SEO, it is still built on WordPress. That gives you the flexibility to switch hosting providers if you should ever chose to do so (unlike a proprietary CMS).

What does this mean for my business? What does this mean for my business?

Return On Investment

Our Framework has helped many local businesses improve their online exposure by addressing many of Google’s ranking factors — all in one efficient install. Using our Framework also allows our developers to save time by using custom shortcodes we’ve built over the years to carry out various functions within our clients’ websites. That means we can do more in less time — saving you money and streamlining the development process!

SEO Client Success Stories

Web Design FAQs

How much does it cost to build a website?

We offer website packages at different price points (starting at $3000) to suit your project’s budget. We also create custom proposals for projects that have very specific technical requirements (or don’t fall within the parameters of our website packages). We’ve handled creative design projects as large as $75,000 for brands such as Lake Louise Ski Resort, Insight Medical Imaging and Go Insurance.

Why is WordPress the best option for my website?

WordPress is used by close to 40% of all websites on the internet! It also gives you the flexibility to perform most updates yourself. In addition, if you want to host the website through a third party, WordPress will let you do that (unlike proprietary content management systems offered by other web design companies in Edmonton). When combined with our Web3 Framework, we’ve been pushing WordPress development to new heights, reaching loading speeds of as fast as 500-900 milliseconds! Lastly, we believe that working with a website design company focused on WordPress will result in lower long term costs, as we’ve noticed that web design agencies offering their own CMS (content management system) tend to charge more for updates (since the client has no other choice for maintenance!).

What is the web design process?

At Web3, our website design process starts with a client analysis (an initial meeting, either virtual or in-person, with the client (you) and one of our designers, to discuss website must-have’s and specific ideas). After that, our talented web design and marketing teams will go to work on the design and structure of your website. Once our layouts are designed and approved, our developers will utilize our Framework to build the newly-created custom layouts into a fully-functional, responsive website. After that, our SEO experts and content writers will work with you to create dynamic content, optimized for search engines. Once the content is placed within your website and the finished product is approved by you, we will launch your new website! You can also chose to hire us for ongoing SEO services to improve visibility on search engines like Google.

What are the ongoing costs of website hosting and maintenance?

The primary costs of maintaining your new website (which starts at approximately $40/month) include website hosting, monitoring, and domain registration. We also offer additional monthly plans to improve your website’s search ranking on Google. These plans include our monthly SEO plan, Google AdWords Maintenance, and Facebook Ads Maintenance – just to name a few!

How long will it take to build my website?

Most websites built within our package plans take 4-6 weeks to complete; however, if information and feedback are not provided by the client in a timely manner, projects can take longer. Because our Framework has many built-in shortcodes and components, page elements can be developed more easily, meaning we can expedite the development of many of our clients’ websites.

Why choose a web design agency over a freelancer?

We’ve been a top web design company in Edmonton for over 15 years. If there’s one thing we can say, it’s trust experience. Saving money in the short term by working with a ‘jack of all trades,’ can have a tendency to cost your business more in the long run. Our proprietary server configuration and web design process ensure that your website won’t be a roadside casualty, but rather a top-performing masterpiece.

What Our Clients Are Saying

4.7 / 5 Based on 56 reviews
posted on Google

“Our company hired Web3 to redesign our current website with a more updated, responsive and most importantly secure website. It was important that the website be user friendly and have the ability to be updated by our staff. Web3 exceeded our expectations in design, functionality and communication. We've received so many positive comments about our new site. I would go as far as to say that Web3 is the best web design company in Edmonton! Thank you Anton and Chi and the rest of the Web3 team! ”

John Laureano
